mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute 
INSERT INTO clients (leadId, source, name, email, phone, company, tags, isConverted, totalBookings, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'lead', name, email, COALESCE(phone, ''), COALESCE(company, ''), '[]', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW()
FROM leads
WHERE id = 420004;

-- Verificar
SELECT id, name, email, leadId FROM clients WHERE email = 'maria.garcia.test@gmail.com';
